resources.string: Current network is not available, please check if networking is turned on！
Please enter your contact information, click send, and you will be contacted later！

This software is owned by "Room D107, Teaching 43" of Tianjin University as part of the graduation content of a class of 19 graduate students; if you have any questions, [click]-Feedback-communicate with us
Do you want to log out of this login？
Please enter a new host ip address, otherwise I cannot login？
